titleStmt.title: SII 11.68: original edition by C. R. Krishnamacharlu, R. S. Panchamukhi, N. Lakshminaraya Rao and H. K. Narasimhaswami
No. 68. (B.K. No. 69 of 1929-30). TAMMADHAḌḌI, MUDDEBIHAL TALUK, BIJAPUR DISTRICT. ON A SLAB IN THE VILLAGE chāvaḍi.

summary.p: The inscription which is engraved in characters of the 12th century A.D. purports to be a record of Jayasiṁhadēva who bore the titles Vikramasiṁha and Trailōkyamalla and who was ruling the kingdom from his capital at Hoṭṭaḷakeṟe. It registers the grant of land made to the temples of Balēśvaradēva and Mūlasthānadēva at Taṁbedhaḍe (modern Tammadhaḍḍi) by Balikabbe-gauḍi, the wife of Paśāyita Durgimayya who was the Heggaḍe of the Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Koṇḍiṟuva Gōmarasa of Nālvatuṁbāḍa (i.e., NalatwāḍIn).

The date of the record is Pushya, amāvāsyā, Uttarāyaṇa-saṅkrānti, Sunday. If the king of this record is taken to be Jayasiṁha II, the details would correspond to Sunday, 23rd December, A.D. 1033.; f.d.t. ·55. ‘Trailōkyamalla’ and ‘Vikramasiṁha’ would appear to be new birudas of the king. Jayasiṁha III, a son of Sōmēśvara I had the biruda ‘Trailōkyamalla,’ but he never ascended the throne.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
� śrīgurubhyō namaḥ . Ōṁ namastuṅgaśira(ḥ)ścuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē . traiḷō
kya(ṁ)nagarāraṁbha(ṁ)mūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē . svasti samastabhūvanā
śrayaṁ śrī prithvīvallabhaṁ mahārājādhirājaṁ paramēśvaraṁ
paramabhaṭṭārakaṁ satyāśrayakuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ traiḷōkyamallaṁ
śrīmatu vikramasiṁha jayasiṁhadēvara vijayarājya muttarō
ttarābhivriddhipravarddhamāna mācaṁdrārkkatāraṁbaraṁ saluttamire hoṭṭaḷa
keṟeya nelevīḍinoḷu śukhasaṁkhathāvi
nōdadiṁ rājyaṁgēutire tatpādapadumōpajīviyappa samastaprasastisa
hitaṁ mahāmaṁḍaḷēsvaraṁ śrīnālvatuṁbāḍada koṁḍiṟuva gōmarasa Ava
ra herggaḍe paśāita durggimayana Ardhdhaṁgalakṣmi balikabegauḍi śrīmatu taṁbedhaḍe
balēśvaradēvargge biṭṭa dēvaśa pauṣyadamavāse Ādityavāra Utarāyaṇa saṁThe letter ṇa is engraved below the line.
kramāṇa nimitavāgi koṁḍiṟuva gōmarasana kosagaraṁ mataru 30
Ā mūvattaṟoḷage Ippattanālkakaṁ Aruvaṇa matarige cauvala śrī mūlastā
nadēvargge Anigarada mataru 6 nivēdyakke biṭṭa haraḷa mataru 6 Aṁtā 12 mataru
sarvvanamasya maneya nivēśaṇa caturāśra 30 kai śrīmatu baligāuḍi balēsva
radēvargge biṭṭa tōṁṭa mattaru 1 śrītaṁbedhaḷiya catusīmeyoḷage Eli
hēḷdedaḍaṁ mudrāpaṇa śrīmūlastānadēvargge Intīdarmavaṁ sadarmadiṁ
pratipāḷisidavargge gaṁgevāraṇāsi gurukṣētra meṁbivaṟaḷu
sahasrakavileyaṁ kōḍuvaṁ koḷaguvaṁ honnaluṁ beḷḷiya(ṁ)luṁ
kaṭṭisi sahasravēdapāregarappa brāhmaṇargge koṭṭa phalavaṁ haḍe
varu Intī dharmmaka Āvanāgi Apāyavaṁ ninisidavaṁge gaṁgevā
raṇāsigurukṣētraveṁbivaṟoḷu Ā kavileyuṁ Ā brāhma
ṇarumaṁ koṁda phalava haḍavaru nigōdi kiḷivaru . svadattaṁ paradattaṁ
vā yōharētu vasuṁdharē saṣṭirvvarṣasahasrāṇi vriṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē krimi[ḥ .*]
grāmēkā rannekā bhūmēkā Ardhamaṁguli haraṁ narakaṁ vāpnōti Āva
dhābhutasaṁplavaṁ . śrībalēsvaradēvara dēgulavaṁ haḍisalisalu baḍagi
malōjage Ā keyoḷage mattaru 6 .
Digital edition of SII 11.68 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
